name: Acuity Brands, Inc.
description: Acuity Brands, Inc. is a market-leading industrial technology company that designs, manufactures, and distributes lighting and building management solutions. The company's comprehensive portfolio includes commercial, industrial, and residential lighting fixtures, controls, and intelligent building systems. Through its innovative technology and services, Acuity Brands aims to deliver exceptional energy efficiency, safety, and productivity, helping customers create smarter, safer, and more sustainable spaces across North America and international markets.
